f5f62a1c-c847-493c-89f7-06bd383a2025.name: EVCC: 一段时间内的累积能量

targets.query: SELECT sum("value") /1000 from gridDailyEnergy WHERE $timeFilter  tz('$timezone')
SELECT sum("value") /1000 from pvDailyEnergy WHERE $timeFilter  tz('$timezone')
SELECT sum("value") /1000 from homeDailyEnergy WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')
SELECT sum("value") /1000 from loadpointDailyEnergy WHERE $timeFilter AND "loadpoint"::tag !~ $loadpointBlocklist GROUP BY "loadpoint"::tag TZ('$timezone')
SELECT sum("value") /1000 from feedInDailyEnergy WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')
SELECT sum("value") from pvDailyEnergy WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')
SELECT sum("value") from gridDailyEnergy WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')
SELECT sum("value") from feedInDailyEnergy WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')
SELECT sum("value")  from homeDailyEnergy WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')
SELECT sum("value")  FROM "loadpointDailyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter  TZ('$timezone')

properties.value: 通过动态电价节省的电费
按算术平均价的潜在购电

targets.query: SELECT sum("value") /1000 from gridDailyEnergy WHERE $timeFilter  tz('$timezone')
SELECT mean("value") * 100 FROM "tariffGridDailyMean" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT sum(value) * (-1) FROM energyPurchasedDailyPrice WHERE $timeFilter  tz('$timezone')
SELECT sum(value) * (-1) FROM energySoldDailyPrice WHERE $timeFilter  tz('$timezone')
SELECT "value" * 100 FROM "tariffGridDailyMax" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT "value" * 100 FROM "tariffGridDailyMean" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT value FROM energyPurchasedDailyPrice WHERE $timeFilter  tz('$timezone')
SELECT value/1000 from gridDailyEnergy WHERE $timeFilter  tz('$timezone')
SELECT "value" * 100 FROM "tariffGridDailyMin" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT sum("value") from chargeDailyEnergy WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')
SELECT sum("value") from dischargeDailyEnergy WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')
SELECT "value" FROM "batteryMaxSoc" WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')
SELECT "value" FROM "batteryMinSoc" WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')

libraryPanel.name: EVCC: 一段时间内的累积能量

targets.query: SELECT value as "pv" FROM "pvMonthlyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter TZ('$timezone')
SELECT value as "grid" FROM "gridMonthlyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter  TZ('$timezone')
SELECT value * (-1)  as home FROM "homeMonthlyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter   TZ('$timezone')
SELECT value * (-1)  FROM "loadpointMonthlyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter AND "loadpoint"::tag !~ $loadpointBlocklist GROUP BY ("loadpoint"::tag)  TZ('$timezone')
SELECT value * (-1) as feedin FROM "feedInMonthlyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter  TZ('$timezone')
SELECT value FROM "gridMonthlyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')

SELECT SUM("last") FROM
(
  SELECT last("value") FROM "loadpointMonthlyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d),"loadpoint"::tag tz('$timezone')
) GROUP BY time(1d) tz('$timezone')
SELECT value FROM "homeMonthlyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter  tz('$timezone')
SELECT value FROM "pvMonthlyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')
SELECT value FROM "feedInMonthlyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')
SELECT value FROM "pvDailyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')
SELECT value FROM "homeDailyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')

SELECT SUM("last") FROM
(
  SELECT last("value") FROM "loadpointDailyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d),"loadpoint"::tag tz('$timezone')
) GROUP BY time(1d) tz('$timezone')
SELECT value FROM "gridDailyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')
SELECT "value" FROM "pvDailyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')
SELECT "value" FROM "homeDailyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')

SELECT SUM("last") FROM
(
  SELECT last("value") FROM "loadpointDailyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d),"loadpoint"::tag tz('$timezone')
) GROUP BY time(1d) tz('$timezone')
SELECT "value" FROM "gridDailyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter tz('$timezone')

) GROUP BY time(1d) tz('$timezone')

) GROUP BY time(1d) tz('$timezone')

panels.description: 消费需要几个月的时间才能变得有意义。外部充电被忽略并扭曲结果。

targets.query: SELECT "value" FROM "vehicleOdometerDailyMax" WHERE $timeFilter AND value > 0 AND "vehicle"::tag !~ $vehicleBlocklist GROUP BY "vehicle"::tag tz('$timezone')
SELECT spread("value") FROM "vehicleOdometerDailyMax" WHERE $timeFilter AND value > 0 AND "vehicle"::tag !~ $vehicleBlocklist GROUP BY "vehicle"::tag tz('$timezone')
SELECT sum("value")/1000 FROM "vehicleMonthlyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter  AND value > 0 AND "vehicle"::tag !~ $vehicleBlocklist GROUP BY "vehicle" tz('$timezone')

panels.title: 车辆

panels.description: 仅当车辆插入电源时才会捕获公里数。如果很少插入电源，公里数可能会丢失。

targets.query: SELECT "value" FROM "vehicleMonthlyDrivenKm" WHERE $timeFilter AND value > 0 AND "vehicle"::tag !~ $vehicleBlocklist GROUP BY "vehicle"::tag  tz('$timezone')

panels.title: 每月行驶公里数

targets.query: SELECT "value" FROM "vehicleMonthlyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter AND value>0 AND "vehicle"::tag !~ $vehicleBlocklist GROUP BY "vehicle"::tag  tz('$timezone')

panels.description: 数值为近似值。不包括外部充电，捕获的公里数取决于车辆充电的频率。

targets.query: SELECT "value" FROM "vehicleMonthlyEnergy" WHERE $timeFilter AND value > 0 AND "vehicle"::tag !~ $vehicleBlocklist GROUP BY "vehicle"::tag  tz('$timezone')
SELECT "value" FROM "vehicleMonthlyDrivenKm" WHERE $timeFilter and value > 0 AND "vehicle"::tag !~ $vehicleBlocklist GROUP BY "vehicle"::tag  tz('$timezone')

panels.title: 消耗量（千瓦时/100公里）

list.description: 时区：此处列出的 TZ 标识符：https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones#List
list.label: 时区
list.name: timezone

list.description:
不应显示的加载点列表。表达式必须是以 / 开头和结尾的正则表达式。它不能为空。如果不应过滤任何内容，请使用不与任何条目匹配的表达式。

示例：
没有条目：/^无$/
过滤掉“车库”：/^车库$/
过滤掉“车库”和“Stellplatz”：/^Garage$|^Stellplatz$/
过滤以“foo”开头的所有内容：/^foo.*$/
list.label: 加载点的阻止列表
list.name: loadpointBlocklist

list.description:
不应显示的车辆列表。表达式必须是以 / 开头和结尾的正则表达式。它不能为空。如果不应过滤任何内容，请使用不与任何条目匹配的表达式。

示例：
没有条目：/^无$/
过滤掉“车库”：/^车库$/
过滤掉“车库”和“Stellplatz”：/^Garage$|^Stellplatz$/
过滤以（离线）结尾的车辆：/^.*\(离线\)$/
list.label: 车辆黑名单
list.name: vehicleBlocklist
